title: All screens, Close button
scenario: Onboarding screens do not close and return to original screen when Close (X) button is tapped
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If not already on the Home screen, navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap on a device to enter Device Settings.
4. Navigate to an onboarding screen (e.g., first-time setup for ANC, Transparency Mode, or Equalizer).
5. Tap the Close (X) button on the onboarding screen.
expected: The onboarding screen closes and the user is returned to the original screen (Supported Devices or Home screen).
